weak_aliases.reason: Useful for search, not merge authority.
Useful for search, not merge authority.

suggested_rules: Merge entity records when they share the same canonical identity key (entity_kathy-hochul) and refer to the same named individual with the same official title and jurisdiction.
Minor entity_type differences (government_official vs person) are classification variants not identity barriers.
suggestion.rationale: Both records refer to the same person: Kathy Hochul, Governor of New York State. The shared identity key entity_kathy-hochul is decisive. Payload fields show the same name ('Kathy Hochul'), same office ('Governor of New York State'), and same policy context (MTA Open Data Act/Law). The entity_type difference (government_official vs person) is a classification label, not an identity distinction. Source evidence from open_data_plan_2022 (addressee) and open_data_lessons_2026/open_data_plan_2024_update/open_data_plan_2025_update (signatory context) all describe the same individual. Merge recommended with high confidence.
